ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartphone, wearable) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., m/s^2, degrees) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., acceleration, gravity, linear acceleration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the data belongs to */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the data belongs to */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice command */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the voice command belongs to */,
  "voice_command" TEXT /* Voice command */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the voice command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_commands_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)
